prompt: Show a color picker using ColorPicker.Root with nested ColorArea.Root and ColorSlider.Root children — import ColorPicker from '@tale-ui/react/color-picker', ColorArea from '@tale-ui/react/color-area', and ColorSlider from '@tale-ui/react/color-slider'. Use <ColorArea.Root> and <ColorSlider.Root> inside ColorPicker.Root. Do NOT use useState or import from @internationalized/color. Use defaultValue with a plain CSS string on ColorPicker.Root.
